textByHashes.e21643117440db507eb27695689efc95c35de438: This cannot stand! It's a complete outrage!
textByHashes.81a6e17e93ee2c125f066f44894046a60886b1f0: My ship! The front fell off!
textByHashes.22d9c662662101df7ee85d2d3d4948af81e8aea5: Yes! That's not very typical, I'd like to make that point!
textByHashes.e695653d351821388c738197990a7919db0f7b2b: Well, there are a lot of ships going around the world all the time, and very seldom does anything like this happen!
textByHashes.06f5737fb745bbe04749ad327bdc2cbf5a9b1629: Because of that meteorologist! He didn't provide the usual weather report and we sailed right into a storm!
textByHashes.45cd0046277212635326668d07e761584fc68ea3: Are you saying it's my fault?
textByHashes.a40195461ed65741c3b3c36ae18b76ac81ca577e: Look, I wouldn't say my ship wasn't safe... It just perhaps wasn't quite as safe as some of the other ones. Some of them are built so the front doesn't fall off at all.
